summary: TrendScout pricing launch testing completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI correctly display Starter (£19), Pro (£39), Elite (£79) pricing. No references to old 'Growth' plan. All checkout sessions work with live Stripe integration.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status
Backend: GET /api/stripe/plans returns 4 plans with correct pricing
Backend: Free plan verified at £0/month
Backend: Starter plan verified at £19/month
Backend: Pro plan verified at £39/month
Backend: Elite plan verified at £79/month
Backend: No 'Growth' plan in /api/stripe/plans
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with test user credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login rejects invalid credentials
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns elite plan for admin
Backend: Feature access requires authentication
Backend: Admin users blocked from checkout (already have full access)
Backend: POST create-checkout-session works for starter plan
Backend: POST create-checkout-session works for pro plan
Backend: POST create-checkout-session works for elite plan
Backend: Free plan checkout correctly rejected
Backend: Invalid plan 'growth' checkout rejected
Backend: Checkout requires authentication
Frontend: Pricing page loaded with data-testid='pricing-page'
Frontend: Pricing page headline shows 'Simple pricing. Powerful intelligence.'
Frontend: Starter card shows '£19/month'
Frontend: Pro card shows '£39/month' with 'Recommended' badge
Frontend: Elite card shows '£79/month'
Frontend: pricing-cta-starter button present
Frontend: pricing-cta-pro button present
Frontend: pricing-cta-elite button present
Frontend: Feature comparison table shows Starter (£19), Pro (£39), Elite (£79)
Frontend: No references to old 'Growth' plan name on pricing page
Frontend: Landing page pricing section shows Starter £19, Pro £39, Elite £79
Frontend: Landing page pricing CTA buttons have correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: No references to 'Growth' plan on landing page pricing section
critical_code_review_comments: Backend subscription_service.py correctly defines: free (£0), starter (£19), pro (£39), elite (£79)
Frontend PricingPage.jsx PLANS array correctly shows Starter £19, Pro £39, Elite £79
Frontend LandingPage.jsx pricing section at lines 312-330 correctly updated to Starter £19, Pro £39, Elite £79
All Stripe Price IDs properly loaded from environment variables (STRIPE_STARTER_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_ELITE_PRICE_ID)
CTA buttons correctly use plan IDs: pricing-cta-starter, pricing-cta-pro, pricing-cta-elite
Feature comparison table has correct pricing in headers: Starter (£19), Pro (£39), Elite (£79)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing launch fully tested and verified. All pricing correctly aligned: Starter £19, Pro £39, Elite £79. Backend /api/stripe/plans returns correct data. Frontend PricingPage.jsx and LandingPage.jsx both display correct pricing. Checkout sessions work with live Stripe (returns real checkout URLs). Admin users correctly get elite access via is_admin flag and are blocked from checkout. No references to old 'Growth' plan remain.
